name: Everyday Broccoli Cheese Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 can (10 1/4 oz) Campbell's NEW Cream of Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet over medium heat, cook the chicken in hot margarine for 10 minutes or until browned on both sides. Spoon off any excess fat.
2. Stir in the soup, water, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
3. Add the broccoli and reduce the heat to low. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes or until the chicken is fork-tender and the broccoli is done, stirring occasionally.
4. Makes 4 servings.
Posted by Stephen Ceideberg; October 14 1992.
